englishDefinitions: Small personal-care items provided by a hotel, such as soap, shampoo, conditioner, lotion, and toothpaste.
persianTranslation: وسایل بهداشتی کوچک که هتل در اختیار مهمان می‌گذارد
examples: The hotel toiletries included shampoo, soap, and a small bottle of body lotion.
She packed the hotel toiletries in her bag before checking out.
This hotel uses eco-friendly toiletries in refillable bottles.
